description: Group surfaces as a CONVERSATION (hermetic, single-instance): create a group and prove it enters the sidebar conversation list as 'group_<gid>' (l3_dump_state.conversationIds — the flat id companion to conversations[], so EXACT membership avoids the group_tox_1 ⊂ group_tox_10 substring trap). The conversation list is UI-live and rebuilds from knownGroups shortly after the create, so the gate POLLS (state_contains_item) before asserting. Distinct from l3_group_send_persist (which only proves the FFI/knownGroups layer) — this proves the UIKit sidebar surface. Self-cleans via teardown leave.
